BTC.reasoning: Setup flat coerente per conflitto interno: trend ribassista forte (SMA -14%) vs RSI 22.7 e F&G=10 (Extreme Fear) che spingono contrarian. Ho pesato F&G come contrarian ma neutralizzato da derivati misti (funding lieve positivo, long affollati, OI -8%). Conviction già bassa, ulteriore -1 per fragilità.

ETH.reasoning: Flat decision holds due to clear conflict: strong negative trend (SMA, rel BTC) offset by oversold RSI and Extreme Fear. F&G=10 weighed primarily as contrarian signal but derivatives (declining longs, neutral taker) provide no confirmation, preventing momentum classification. No fragility warranting veto or further conviction cut.

ALLO.reasoning: Setup fragile: +179% 7d, RSI 81.3 e dist_SMA +195% indicano estensione eccessiva nonostante Extreme Fear. F&G pesato come contrarian ma neutralizzato da momentum e derivati neutri (OI in calo, funding ~0); conflitto evidente, long non regge.

BEAT.reasoning: Setup holds: overextension + reversal confirmed by RSI/SMA and positive funding favoring shorts. Extreme Fear weighed as momentum (not contrarian) because OI drop, long/short collapse to 0.39 and taker >1 align with downside continuation rather than bottoming signal. No contradictions.

SKYAI.reasoning: Setup coerente: tre driver trend negativi forti giustificano flat. Extreme Fear (10) pesato come momentum (paura accompagna sell-off, OI in calo, taker neutro) non contrarian; nessuna contraddizione rilevante.
